Solid-ICT

Backend Developer

Istanbul, Türkiye · 2 hours ago · Over 100 applicants

Promoted by hirer · No response insights available yet

Hybrid
Full-time
Easy Apply

About the job

We are a technology company building scalable digital products and AI-powered solutions for our clients.

Our team consists of 70+ developers, designers, and testers working on end-to-end software development projects.

We focus on modern architectures, AI-assisted development approaches, and high-impact solutions across industries.

What You’ll Do

  • Design and develop scalable backend services and APIs
  • Work with modern architectures including event-driven systems and queue structures
  • Contribute to services built with technologies such as .NET, Node.js, or similar backend stacks
  • Work with or integrate TypeScript-based systems when needed
  • Integrate AI/LLM APIs (e.g., OpenAI or similar) into products
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams on system design and architecture decisions

What We’re Looking For

  • Minimum 4–5 years of experience in software development
  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or a related field
  • Strong backend development experience (.NET, Node.js, Java, or similar)
  • Solid understanding of API design and scalable system architecture
  • Familiarity with TypeScript or willingness to learn
  • Experience or knowledge of queue/streaming systems (Kafka, RabbitMQ, etc.)
  • Good understanding of database design and data modeling
  • Interest in or hands-on experience with AI / LLM APIs (e.g., OpenAI)
  • Strong problem-solving skills and a proactive mindset

About the company

Solid-ICT

14,618 followers

Software Development

•

51-200 employees

Solid-ICT, founded in 2011, is one of the top ranked software development agencies in Turkey. We have a broad and diverse portfolio of projects ranging from mobile app development all the way to back end scalable systems solutions. The modern stack is where we excel. Our client roster includes but is not limited to GSM operators, banks, financial institutions, universities, social entrepreneurs, and the entertainment industry. We've done great work in Istanbul and have decided to bring the same quality of work to clients in Europe. Our London office is now open, and we are ready to take on all sorts of new challenges. Connect with us and let's talk.
